state_rules.resolved: Existing or externally supplied issue identity with explicit repo and positive issue number.
state_rules.proposed: Future issue packet with explicit repo and no GitHub issue number yet.
state_rules.unresolved: Node intentionally has no issue identity yet.
state_rules.blocked: Missing, invalid, or ambiguous repo or issue identity.

normalization_rules: Never derive repo from current checkout, chat text, default repo, or issue title.
Normalize every resolved issue identity to owner/repo#number.
Treat the same issue number in different repositories as different identities.
Represent future imported seller repository targets as proposed or blocked, never as local-only refs.
Default validation is static, local, read-only, and does not call GitHub.
